dominant_palette: crimson red, jet black, off-white/cream, deep charcoal grey
composition_vocabulary: Tiles oscillate between two poles: tight centred emblems with heavy symmetry (crests, seals, typographic badges) and loose editorial bleeds where the subject pushes to the frame edge. Negative space is used deliberately in the minimal pieces but abandoned entirely in the maximalist ones, creating a collection that reads dense at a glance.
lighting_quality: Predominantly flat graphic lighting with occasional deep chiaroscuro in the illustrated and photographic tiles — no consistent naturalistic light source.
material_textures: embossed leather, matte cotton canvas, aged parchment, polished metal seal, raw denim, screen-printed ink
aesthetic_register: The sample sits at the intersection of streetwear-archive and heraldic luxury — not fine-jewellery editorial, but brand-world worldbuilding that borrows the grammar of old-money crests and occult symbolism and grafts it onto contemporary apparel objects.
notably_absent: Conventional luxury-jewellery signifiers are almost entirely missing — no macro gemstone shots, no soft-focus skin-on-metal styling, no feminine editorial softness, no white-box product photography.
